revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia community/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikipedia community/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia community/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikipedia community/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Wikipedia community/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikipedia community/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}}
== Usage ==
{{Collapsible option |statename=optional}}
==Purpose==
This navbox is intended to be a footer version of {{tl|Noticeboard links}}, although it is also a possible replacement.
It is a superset of {{tl|Noticeboard links}}, also including other community-oriented pages on the English Wikipedia.
The idea is to use this as a footer on appropriate pages that don't have the {{tl|Noticeboard links}} header.
It excludes, for the most part, help pages and rule pages. It's more a directory towards tasks, assistance, news and debates.
==See also==
Other useful navbox footers:
* {{tl|Wikipedia editor navigation}}: an amalgamation of navboxes that includes this navbox * {{tl|Useful links}}: a collection of shortcuts, mostly in [[:en:All-caps|All-caps]] (e.g., [[Wikipedia:Three revert rule|WP:3RR]]), but with the full title of each page available by hovering the mouse pointer over its shortcut * {{tl|Wikipedia help pages}} * {{tl|Wikipedia technical help}} * {{tl|Manual of Style}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|community}} }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal navigational templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
